message:
refactor(fusion,index,simd): compute in_both_sources inline during RRF insertion, use hash-based dedup and WAL lookup in search, simplify SIMD loops

- RRF fusion: compute in_both_sources flag inline when lexical or semantic
  results are inserted into the scratch map, eliminating the separate
  post-insertion pass over all fused hits
- Vector search resolve_sorted_entries: pre-build a HashSet of WAL doc_id
  hashes for O(1) lookup instead of O(W) linear scan per main-index winner;
  use doc_id_hash for dedup in the seen set instead of cloning String
  doc_ids, avoiding heap allocation per winner while maintaining correctness
  (64-bit FNV-1a collision probability ~K²/2⁶⁵ is negligible at typical K)
- SIMD dot products: revert multi-accumulator unrolling back to simpler
  single-accumulator chunks_exact(8) loops for f16/f32/f32-bytes paths —
  the multi-accumulator approach added code complexity without measurable
  benefit on the target hardware; remove now-unused load_f32x8,
  decode_f16x8_from_bytes, and decode_f32x8_from_bytes helper functions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
